info.name: 001 DISCRETIONARY_CREDIT_SYSTEM
info.description: 002 – Run after DB rebuild. Flow: (1) Login Super Admin (seeded superadmin/SuperAdmin1!), (2) Create Admin User (creates shared admin: username=admin, password=Admin123!), (3) Login Admin. Sets env and globals: adminUsername, adminPassword, adminUserId, username, password, adminAuthToken, authToken, superAdminAuthToken for downstream collections (003, 004, etc.). All discretionary endpoints use /api/v1/ prefix.
